programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Yanni's in Seattle, where he clashes with defiant owner Peter Avgoustiou, a chef so set in his ways that he hasn't allowed any changes to his menu since the Greek restaurant opened in 1984. Peter's family is concerned the business is becoming trapped in the past, and standards are slipping, but he seems determined to stick to his guns

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Highlights of the food and chat show, with Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Highlights from the series, focusing on Sarah, her husband Graham and their four boys as they settle into their new rural family life

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another, and the police give the Osbornes some worrying news. Two residents decide to move forward together, and Warren steps in to help Mercedes. Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray, Rachel Riley and Susie Dent host, with John Thomson in Dictionary Corner, as contestants race against the clock to pit their wits against words and numbers

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: A desperate Rebecca goes to extraordinary lengths to get a moment alone with Evan Drake as he prepares to move to Japan. Comedy, starring Kirstie Alley and Tom Skerritt

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Rebecca is fired and replaced as manager by Sam - who generously rehires her but fails to make it clear there are strings attached. Comedy, starring Ted Danson and Kirstie Alley

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Sam finds out an ex-girlfriend's child might be his and swears an oath of celibacy to preclude the possibility of siring any more unwanted heirs. Ted Danson stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The Barones spend Thanksgiving with Amy's parents, but the festivities get off to a bad start by her father's drastic response to the plight of an injured bird. Things liven up when the two families split into teams of Native Americans and Pilgrims to mark the national holiday. Comedy, starring Brad Garrett and Monica Horan

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: The kids damage Ray's dictionary, prompting Frank to tell everyone about the time Ray ruined his prized jazz collection. However, he discovers that he may not have been the culprit all along

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra helps to plan a recruitment party at Frank's lodge, leading Ray to grumble about how much time she is spending away from home. Comedy, starring Patricia Hearten and Ray Romano

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Niles tries to ask Daphne for a date but she misunderstands his intentions, and Frasier has a frustrating episode of his own. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Jane Leeves

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The number of large noses in Rick's family causes concern for Roz as she thinks about what her baby will look like. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier and Niles throw a singles party, where they're both attracted to the same woman. However, before either of them can make a move, Roz steals the show. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: A broken Swiss watch, car trouble, a birthday surprise and a party thrown by Niles's latest lover all combine to ruin Frasier's chances of romance with an attractive new acquaintance. With Kelsey Grammer and Lisa Waltz

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It
programme.desc: In Cockermouth, Cumbria, Simon O'Brien and Henry Cole meet blacksmith Jon, who spent many years working on fairgrounds. At the valuation, independent valuer Ronnie Archer-Morgan reckons there's rich pickings to be made from railway memorabilia

programme.title: Help! We Bought a Village
programme.desc: In France, work is under way to repair the old church at a purpose-built ramshackle Catholic holiday village, and the owners of a hamlet wake up to find it has flooded. In Italy, the owners of an earthquake-damaged borgo find out that caring for their property is not as easy as they thought

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the long-running words-and-numbers game with John Thomson joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Liv from Wiltshire has been dreaming of owning a holiday home abroad for many years and, after selling her house in the UK, is finally in the position to make it happen. Ben Hillman helps find some suitable abodes on the west coast of Cyprus within her a budget of £87,000 for Liv and her good friend Daisy to consider

programme.title: Narrow Escapes
programme.desc: Roger and Jo cruise to Teddington Lock to recreate their wedding photos. Claire continues her blooming greenhouse tugboat transformation. Michelle heads out of the Lancashire marina for her first proper cruise

programme.title: Chateau DIY
programme.desc: May and Guy tackle their monumental list of projects at Château de la Vigne. Vivienne and Simon race to complete their Bridgerton-inspired master bedroom at Château de la Croix Boisée. At Château de Lalacelle, Terry and Ashley revamp their chateau's front garden before an open day

programme.title: Sun, Sea and Selling Houses
programme.desc: Former chef Liz from Lincolnshire turns to Sharon and Shaun Garner to help her acquire her perfect 'Goldilocks' property in Spain, a country she has had her eye on for 10 years. In Murcia, Darren and Natalie Brown hunt for a dream holiday retreat for recently retired John and his partner Sue. When their first offering misses the mark because of its top floor location, it becomes clear that a large and easily accessible swimming pool for their seven grandchildren is the number one priority

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Bake Off: The Professionals
programme.desc: The teams channel all their patisserie experience into creating 24 identical battenberg cakes and 24 reinvented versions of the colourful classic. They then have five and a half hours to create a dramatic Shakespeare-inspired theatrical scene, complete with puddings based on the 16th-century dessert fruit fool. Ellie Taylor and Liam Charles follow their progress, while Benoit Blin and Cherish Finden taste their efforts

programme.title: Falling
programme.desc: Anna feels out of place and struggles to settle back into old routines, seeking guidance from a trusted confidant. David begins to find his feet again, helping out old friends. But as he wrestles with his true feelings, Susan encourages him to take action and face his fears. Romantic drama, starring Keeley Hawes and Paapa Essiedu

programme.title: 24 Hours in A&E
programme.desc: One of the Queen's Medical Centre's own staff members is admitted after being knocked off her mountain bike. As one of the longest serving members of the A&E team, Lou's colleagues and close friends are concerned she may have serious internal bleeding as well as severe injuries to her shoulder and wrist. Doctors prepare to realign the bones of 57-year-old Stuart, who is in resus with a severely fractured and dislocated ankle, having fallen from a ladder

programme.title: Emergency
programme.desc: A mum of three is rushed to St Mary's with a femur fracture and broken knee after a car crash and 15 year-old Louie recovers from surgery to repair an artery in his leg after he kicked a glass door at school. London's Air Ambulance team arrive on scene after 20 year-old motorcyclist Tyler collides with a car, they find serious injuries to his right leg, jaw and arm and blood coming out of his ear. Lance Corporal Lee has surgery to bring his spine and pelvis back into the right position after a paragliding accident

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: See No Evil
programme.desc: First of a two-part investigation of the biggest scandal in Church of England history, telling the inside story of prolific abuser John Smyth's sinister world through testimony from his children and widow. In the 1980s, John Smyth was a high-flying barrister offering discipleship to young Christians at Winchester College, then began to invite them to lunches and parties at his family home. Before long he introduced them to a secret and brutal regime, involving cane beatings that he justified as spiritual discipline intended to relieve them of their sins

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three pairs of partners from Blackpool compete to win the £1,000 prize, including former dancer Rowan and businessman John, who start the proceedings. Also vying to win are Sally and Joanne who hope to impress their guests with an unusual menu that features a Tandoori Tower and a belly-busting breakfast, before competitive duo Holly and Ollie pull out all the stops in an attempt to secure the cash

programme.title: Grand Designs
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud follows an ambitious build in Cornwall, as Leigh and Richard transform a derelict 17th-century flour mill into a contemporary, three-bedroom home. They employ traditional craftsmen to start work on restoring the exterior, but it's not long before the true scale of the damage to the structure is revealed, and as the costs rise, they are forced to take on more of the work themselves

programme.title: George Clarke's Amazing Spaces
programme.sub-title: George's Tree House and Garden Shed Pub
programme.desc: The architect prepares to unveil his multi-functional treehouse in the grounds of Kielder Water and Forest Park in Northumberland, and meets a couple with big plans to build a theatre in a 1970s caravan. Plus, a man who has created a pub in his garden shed, and a 19th-century shepherd's hut undergoes restoration using Victorian steam-powered machinery

programme.title: Kirstie's House of Craft
programme.desc: Chef Tony Singh and presenter Sophie Morgan compete to make the best holiday snow globes, and TV personality Mark-Francis Vandelli goes head to head with queen of clean Aggie MacKenzie to make intricate jelly art

programme.title: Sarah Beeny's New Life in the Country
programme.desc: Spring arrives and after months of lockdown, the boys are all heading back to school, meaning Graham can get stuck in to project managing the house build. He and Sarah are planning a large dining room for entertaining, with a centrepiece table that used to belong to rock star Ronnie Wood. Artist Graham also draws on his skills to apply some decorative touches to the room - but will it be theatrical enough for Sarah? Meanwhile, the couple also visit a pig farmer who shows them the cycle from piglet to pork chop

programme.desc: Surrogate mum Phoebe goes into labour and gives birth to triplets, but it proves harder than she anticipated to hand them over to her brother. Meanwhile, Joey experiences some pain of his own and Monica plans to spite Chandler by dating a male nurse

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Phoebe Hates PBS

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross delivers devastating news to Rachel - he cannot spend time with her while Emily is in New York. Meanwhile, Joey discovers Chandler's secret romance. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston and David Schwimmer

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Emily asks Ross to move away from his friends, while Monica and Rachel are understandably taken aback to meet a hairy man who they mistake for a yeti. American comedy, starring David Schwimmer and Helen Baxendale

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Moves In

programme.title: Kevin and Perry Go Large (2000)
programme.desc: The teenage duo are thrilled when their parents agree to let them go to Ibiza, and promptly embark on an increasingly desperate quest to find stardom as club DJs and lose their virginity on the sun-kissed shores - but seem certain to fail. Comedy, starring Harry Enfield, Kathy Burke, Rhys Ifans, James Fleet and Paul Whitehouse

They then head off for a bike ride - but what Barney forgets to mention to his dad is that they are riding on a tightrope 25 metres in the air

The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. Mitch meets Lily's know-it-all friend and male nanny Andy (Andy DeVine) makes a welcome return

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer has his driving licence revoked for being a menace to other road-users, forcing Marge to take charge of the family car and run endless errands for everyone - a responsibility she soon starts to resent. Featuring the guest voices of Steve Busmen and singer-songwriter Jackson Browne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.title: The Simpsons

US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Modern Family

programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure

programme.desc: Gina Rivera, the president of Phenix Salon Suites in Colorado Springs - a company that rents boutiques to hairdressers, nail technicians and beauty therapists - goes incognito to see first-hand what she needs to improve on and what makes her franchisees successful

programme.desc: Married couple Lara and Greg kick off the competition in Lincolnshire with a global menu inspired by their passion for travelling. Finally, it's ditzy duo Jenna and Mitch's chance to show their guests that looks can be deceptive as they also compete for the cash prize of £1,000

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: South Londoner James is given £12,000 and a maximum of three weeks to plan every detail of his nuptials, but future mother-in-law Janey lends a helping hand, determined to give her daughter Daisy a cockney knees-up. programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In East Anglia, three rival couples compete to host the best dinner party and win £1,000. First up are ultra-competitive poker players Kim and Martin. Their teamwork is tested to the limit whilst preparing their menu of family favourites, with both cooks jostling to take charge. On night two, Debbie and Richard host an Orient Express-themed night of elegance fit for Agatha Christie herself, while finishing off the week are self-proclaimed gadget kings Jamie and Mark, who have a swishy piece of tech for just about every kitchen job going

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: And Then a Detective Comes In
programme.desc: Jack Dee has a dramatic change of wardrobe, Rosie Jones presents her new baby, Babatunde Aléshé attaches ducks to his fingers, Andy Zaltzman starts seeing chickens, and Emma Sidi can't stop thinking about Tamzin Outhwaite. As ever, Alex Horne sets the tasks and Greg Davies decides the winners

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to go up against Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe in the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz. Sam Simmons joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: Jonny wants to split up with his girlfriend - and boss - Liz, but is too scared to do so, while Adam is happy to keep teasing him about her age. Meanwhile, Dad has been drying fish under the stairs and Grandma somehow manages to get locked in the boot of Adam's car when she comes round for dinner. Comedy, starring Tom Rosenthal

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The boys come home to find the builders have been in and the house is in a complete mess. On top of this, there's a mouse loose and Mum takes refuge in the shed, leaving Dad in charge of making dinner. Jim pops round to see if he can help, and is invited for his first-ever Friday night dinner with the Goodmans. Comedy, with Mark Heap

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy agrees to marry Nancy to make her eligible for a visa, and while the would-be bride insists it is purely an administrative procedure, Mark is not sure his friend views the ceremony the same way. Comedy, starring David Mitchell and Robert Webb

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark is distraught after being mugged by two teenagers, and becomes oblivious to Sophie's advances. Jeremy faces a moral dilemma as he waits for the return of his girlfriend, but is offered a threesome. Comedy, starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The team gets a visit from Ryan, whose penchant for the older ladies led to a tattoo no mother would want to see, and Liam gets some artistic help from Sketch. Jay gives Paralympian Jess a portrait worthy of a champion, Alice helps Scott the Scot to get rid of his cutesy stamp, and Carly's revenge tatt is kissed goodbye

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.sub-title: And Then a Detective Comes In
programme.desc: Jack Dee has a dramatic change of wardrobe, Rosie Jones presents her new baby, Babatunde Aléshé attaches ducks to his fingers, Andy Zaltzman starts seeing chickens, and Emma Sidi can't stop thinking about Tamzin Outhwaite. As ever, Alex Horne sets the tasks and Greg Davies decides the winners

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Miles Jupp to go up against Jon Richardson and Sara Pascoe in the comedy panel show's version of the words-and-numbers quiz. Sam Simmons joins Countdown's resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: The chairman and CEO of a New Jersey-based company providing chauffeured luxury transportation goes to work among his own staff by posing as a contestant in a reality show. David Seelinger believes that the quality of customer care helps maintain a company's reputation, and wants to make sure his firm is on the right track for the future

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Robert Powells, co-founder and president of Rocket Fizz Soda Pop and Candy Shops, the largest fizzy drink and sweet shop franchise in America, dons a disguise to go undercover in his own company. The California-based firm has experienced rapid growth and with that comes the responsibility to make sure it stays on track as it gets bigger, so Robert is keen to find out more about the challenges the organisation faces

programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: In series six, more properties are ready for a new lease on life. Can our bros leave their homeowners in high spirits as they take their architectural ambitions to the next level? After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, Andy got a new job, leaving little time for DIY-ing. So it looks like a state andnow it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a family-friendly country home with space for a hockey rink. And is it that much of a surprise when Dana and Andy fall for yet another fixer-upper?Short:After Dana and Andy ripped apart their home, it was left in a state. Now it's up to Jonathan to finish what they started. Meanwhile, Drew keeps his cool while looking for a home with space for a hockey rink

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In the north east of England, married couple Kevin and Lalita kick off the competition with a menu inspired by Italian food and local produce. On day two, local girl Michelle and her southern wife Charlotte put on an Asian themed evening. Finally, the oldest couple in the group, loved-up Richard and Christine, host an evening of what they call dinner party classics

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The first hosts in Sheffield, Ray and Chloe, reckon their French cuisine will help them bag the money, but they're in for a rocky ride. On day two, Andrew and Claire want to push the boat out for their first ever dinner party. However, criticism of their unusual menu causes Andrew to bite back, and things don't improve when he does his Mr Bean impressions. On the last night, food connoisseurs Rob and Emma plan a fine dining menu, but suffer a few unfortunate mishaps in the kitchen. It seems set to be a tight finish and remains unclear who will pocket the £1,000 prize right up to the announcement

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.sub-title: Don't Tell the Bride to Be: The Proposals
programme.desc: Documentary following men and women as they propose to their partners in bold and romantic ways. The programme features a flash mob in a shopping centre and a death-defying abseil, and charts the moments of triumph and disaster as the subjects try to create the ultimate surprise for their unsuspecting loved ones

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Ben, a 30-year-old from Wales, hopes the £12,000 he has at his disposal will provide his controlling fiancee Sarah with the wedding of her dreams. However, her desire to get married abroad and his mother's reluctance to trust his decisions threaten his chances of success

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sam Dushey, the CEO of Shoppers World, goes undercover in his own company. Since taking over the family business, Sam has made it his mission to expand Shoppers World rapidly, and he wants to make sure all of his stores are performing up to his high standards as the business grows. Among the employees he meets are a woman who has worked for the company for eight years without a pay rise, and another who was attacked with pepper spray while trying to stop a robbery

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Tim Betts, the CEO of Muscle Maker Grill, goes undercover in the company he recently bought. Tim wants to make sure the brand is healthy and continues to expand, and he believes it's key that as they grow, each restaurant branch follows the same set of corporate standards. Tim thinks it's the perfect time to learn what's working and what needs an overhaul, so he meets staff including franchisees, a delivery driver, a food truck manager and a cashier whose flirtatious manner shocks him

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Starkville, Mississippi, to try to rescue the failing Hotel Chester. Despite having more than 40 years' experience in the business, owner David Mollendor is at a loss as to how to make his dream of owning his own hotel work, while his wife Sukie is struggling as its chef, tackling the role without any formal catering experience. Gordon discovers a family tragedy that explains why this couple have become trapped in their business and wrestling with debt

programme.title: Ramsay's Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits a dog-friendly hotel in West Dover, Vermont, that is in urgent need of help. Owner Sandy MacDougall runs the Four Seasons Inn like a hostel, with unpaid staff staying in the rooms instead of paying guests. The acerbic chef aims to get the business back on track before Sandy loses everything, but wonders whether it would be kinder to simply put this dog-friendly hotel to sleep

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Jarrod and Brandi hope for more good luck as the buyers return to San Diego, while Ivy comes across a cross-dressing locker

programme.title: Storage Wars
programme.desc: Mary learns a harsh lesson about Dave at auctions in Rancho Palos Verdes, California, while Rene puts a secret strategy to the test

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: A trio of couples try to outdo each other in Aberdeen, coming up with an Ibizan fiesta, a vegetarian-influenced menu, and an evening of posh nosh and dinner party classics

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Babatunde Aléshé knows what a rocket is, Emma Sidi can swear, Jack Dee closely resembles a world-famous artist, Rosie Jones enjoys cheating and Andy Zaltzman refuses to be defeated in an argument over syntax. Greg Davies awards points, praise and pity, while Alex Horne has great fun keeping a record of everything for posterity

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Isy Suttie to go up against Jon Richardson and Richard Osman in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: The boys' other Grandma ruins Christmas when she joins the family at the table for Mum's turkey dinner, accompanied by her equally horrible dog. She has the cheek to bring along her own food, having decided her daughter-in-law's cooking is not up to scratch, and gets into a fight with the most popular Grandma, to everyone's shock. Meanwhile, other dubious festive delights for the clan include Jim turning up dressed as Santa, and Jonny giving Adam a joke present

programme.title: Friday Night Dinner
programme.desc: It's finally happening - Adam is bringing a girl home for dinner, and Mum immediately takes a shine to twentysomething Emma, who's definitely marriage material. But just as things start going smoothly for the young couple, the evening takes a turn for the worse with the arrival of eight-year-old Katie, who has a crush on Adam - much to Jonny's delight. Robert Popper's award-winning comedy starring Simon Bird, Paul Ritter, Tamsin Greig, Tom Rosenthal, Sophia Di Martino and Honor Kneafsey

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Mark is devastated to learn Sophie is moving away, but she suggests they bridge the gap between them by having phone sex. An eccentric old friend asks Jeremy if he wants to manage a pub she owns, but her behaviour gradually grows stranger - leading the flatmates to consider sectioning her. Starring Robert Webb and David Mitchell

programme.title: Peep Show
programme.desc: Jeremy organises a magic mushroom party in the hope of seducing his ex-girlfriend, but his plans are threatened when Mark returns from work with gastric flu. Things go from bad to worse as Super Hans wrecks the toilet door - and the builder they contact does not seem as reliable as they would like. Robert Webb and David Mitchell star

programme.title: Tattoo Fixers on Holiday
programme.desc: The tattoo artists try to help a woman whose mid-life crisis led to body ink that she hates, and a personal trainer with a 'best friends' tattoo that is no longer accurate. Plus, a woman who wants a lasting memorial for her late father, and Sketch designs a nightmare zombie-sloth for a horror-loving couple

programme.title: Taskmaster Bleeped
programme.desc: Babatunde Aléshé knows what a rocket is, Emma Sidi can swear, Jack Dee closely resembles a world-famous artist, Rosie Jones enjoys cheating and Andy Zaltzman refuses to be defeated in an argument over syntax. programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr invites Sean Lock and Isy Suttie to go up against Jon Richardson and Richard Osman in the comedy words-and-numbers quiz. Alex Horne and the Horne Section join resident lexicographer Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner, while Rachel Riley looks after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Rick Forman, founder and CEO of New Jersey-based discount clothing store Forman Mills, goes incognito among his own staff posing as a contestant on a reality show. He plans to go undercover because he intends to double the number of stores in the next year and wants to make sure that all the outlets are doing well so that revenue doubles too

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another, and the police give the Osbornes some worrying news. Two residents decide to move forward together, and Warren steps in to help Mercedes. Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The police give the Osbornes some worrying news, two residents decide to move forward together, and when Warren steps in to help Mercedes, sparks might re-ignite

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. Mitch meets Lily's know-it-all friend and male nanny Andy (Andy DeVine) makes a welcome return

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer has his driving licence revoked for being a menace to other road-users, forcing Marge to take charge of the family car and run endless errands for everyone - a responsibility she soon starts to resent. Featuring the guest voices of Steve Busmen and singer-songwriter Jackson Browne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire feel rejected when Alex deliberately tells them the wrong date for her moving-in day at college as she wants to keep things as low-key as possible, while Luke makes it clear he would rather hang out with schoolfriends than spend the day with his dad. Elsewhere, the rest of the family come up with an elaborate excuse to avoid going to Lily's football game, and things get stressful for Mitch and Cam now after they decided to rent out their top floor

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil helps Haley persuade Claire to let Dylan move in, but he soon has second thoughts after he discovers just what living with him really means. Meanwhile, Mitch takes on a much-needed new role working for Jay's business rivals Closets, Closets, Closets, Closets! and Gloria and Cameron come to blows over how to deal with Manny's problem at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.desc: As the retreat winds down, one couple make amends while others begin planning for the future. However, a serious roadblock forces one pair to confront deep issues and question whether their marriage can last the distance

He wants to find the perfect man to waltz him down the aisle and thinks people that can guarantee to do this are confident, daring and adventurous in their outlook

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant Lee sits down for a meal with Abbi, who lives a more civilised lifestyle than he does. programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Halloween is Claire's favourite holiday, but this year she is snowed under at work, so she allows Phil to take over the house-decorating duties - a decision she soon comes to regret. Jay isn't too happy with the Shrek costume Gloria picked out for him so makes a last-minute change, and soon becomes attached to his new outfit, while Mitch's attempt to escape from a work slump hits a stumbling block

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil and Claire aren't too happy when Haley starts spending a lot of time with Andy. Gloria announces she wants Manny to learn Spanish, so hires a dashing teacher for him, and Cameron and Mitchell make the headlines after meeting a news reporter at a school function

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart gets into trouble with the police for vandalising Flanders' Beatles memorabilia, so Marge sends him on an organised activity scheme to make sure he is supervised at all times. Unfortunately, Homer is appointed team leader, and it is not long before things start to fall apart

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Maggie becomes obsessed with unlikely babysitter Moe - much to the dismay of Marge and Homer, who think he is an unsuitable role model and ban him from seeing her again

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a bounty hunter to earn extra money and hires an unlikely assistant in the form of Ned Flanders - who ends up pursuing him on a charge of skipping bail over a trivial offence. Meanwhile, Marge takes a job at an unusual bakery

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart finds himself in trouble when he steals a mobile phone from Denis Leary and subsequently uses it to land the actor a comical film role. The trouble-maker then leads his family to the ancient ruins of Machu Picchu after Marge confiscates the device and decides to use its GPS technology to track her son

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta takes part in an undercover FBI operation that ends in a mass arrest. But when one of the mobsters escapes he enlists Boyle's help in tracking him down. Captain Holt tests the squad's patience with practice drills in which Sgt Jeffords plays different roles, while Gina pleads with Boyle to keep a secret. US cop comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Andre Braugher

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Captain Holt is taken by surprise when his long-time nemesis, Deputy Chief Madeline Wuntch (guest star Kyra Sedgwick), arrives to carry out an inspection of his precinct. Peralta and Jeffords test the boundaries between 'work friendship' and 'real friendship' while they investigate a stabbing at a trendy milk bar. Boyle searches for a guest to take to his ex-wife's engagement party - will Diaz come to the rescue?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil goes into nesting mode after finding some abandoned duck eggs, while Mitchell worries about Cam's friendship with a group of frat boys. American comedy following the lives of three dysfunctional households, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire takes Haley and Alex into the office for Bring your Daughter to Work Day, while Phil joins Luke and Manny's class for a community service day that offers more lessons than expected. Meanwhile, Gloria is delighted to learn she has been chosen for jury duty, while Cam and Mitchell are in need of a mediator when they start bickering over who to invite to their party

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Claire and Phil have a lot on their plate when Luke is arrested for driving without a licence and they catch Alex coming out of a liquor store. Meanwhile, Cam encourages Gloria to recreate and sell her family's special hot sauce, Mitch helps Jay shoot a video and things get awkward when Haley and Dylan run into Andy and Beth at the cinema

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: A new house on Phil's books proves irresistible to the rest of the family, with Haley getting caught in the act by Andy when she tests out its 16-jet hot tub. Cam and Mitch pay the property a visit as they try to put the spark back into their relationship, but their night of romance is interrupted by others sneaking in with the same idea. Elsewhere, Gloria and Jay prepare to pull off a surprise for everyone

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge takes Lisa for her first manicure at the salon, where they debate whether a woman can be smart, beautiful and powerful all at the same time. Four tales featuring strong women from history and literature are retold with Selma appearing as Elizabeth I, Lisa as Snow White, Marge as Lady Macbeth and Maggie as Howard Roark from The Fountainhead

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An outbreak of food poisoning at Krusty Burger is traced to barley produced in a nearby town of Norwegian immigrants and results in the mills being shut down, so the out-of-work residents venture to Springfield to find new jobs. However, when xenophobia starts to spread, Mayor Quimby decides to shut the borders

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: There's a death in Springfield, while Krusty's confidence takes a beating after he appears on a TV comedy roast with Sarah Silverman and Jeff Ross, prompting him to retire from the business. Lisa becomes worried for Homer's safety, so sets out to prevent him getting hurt

programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Twenty six-year-old psychology student Alesia is tired of meeting 'boys' and is now seeking someone more emotionally mature than her previous partners. Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. programme.title: The Goldbergs

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: Murray struggles to get Adam interested in hockey, but he doesn't enjoy the sport and fakes enthusiasm to please his father. Beverly tries to help Erica prepare for her college entrance exams, but her plans threaten to backfire when she does the job too well

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride: Revisited
programme.desc: Danielle and Jordan pull no punches as they go head to head with best man Adam and bridesmaid Laura to relive their knockout, boxing-themed wedding from 2016

programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.desc: A teenager's grief leads them down a dangerous path, Warren has a surprise for Mercedes, and a couple's relationship might be over before it has begun

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples compete for the £1,000 prize in Swindon, where Carla and Hayley kick off the competition by serving up a spicy Caribbean-themed menu for food snob Jeanette and her husband Rob, and lovebirds Tim and Kath. However, spice-loving Carla causes upset by revealing she plans on bringing her own hot pepper sauce to the other couples' dinner parties

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Divorced couple Stuart and Mandy arrive in the restaurant to offer each other moral support as they try to find love again. Mandy wants an adventurer to whisk her off her feet, and her date, globetrotting Adam, could be just the ticket. Across the restaurant, sparks are also flying as Stuart's cheeky humour has fellow divorcee Claire in stitches. Meanwhile, 30-year-old financial manager J meets aesthetic therapist Sophie, and 23-year-old Nathan has his work cut out to try and win over 21-year-old Morganne

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Anna Richardson presents the dating show in which two singletons choose their favourite from a line-up of six potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time - in all their naked glory. First up is 43-year-old Cathy from Hertfordshire who, with her biological clock ticking, is wanting to settle down and have children. The trouble is she's open to dating men from their 20s to their 60s and finds it hard to choose. Will she find it easier to pick the right partner when they're all naked? Then, 24-year-old Londoner Adam takes centre stage. He hates online dating and has decided to bare all in order to find the perfect match

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Bad Sisters, Nadiya's Everyday Baking, The Kardashians, Super/Natural, Emma Willis: Delivering Babies, and A Trip to Infinity, as well as BBC News reports on the energy cap and a U-turn by Kwasi Kwarteng. First broadcast in October 2022

programme.title: Don't Tell the Bride
programme.desc: In a feature-length episode, groom Andy plans an authentic Ukrainian wedding in fiancee Anna's homeland, hoping both she and her mother will be impressed with his efforts. Unknown to him, however, they are banking on a very British bash

programme.title: Hollyoaks Omnibus
programme.desc: Mercedes sees a side to Jenson that she doesn't like, and Myra finds a hidden camera in the house. Things look up for one family, while panic sets in for another, and the police give the Osbornes some worrying news. Two residents decide to move forward together, and Warren steps in to help Mercedes. Friends support Tony as he tries to find the words for Diane's eulogy. Dodger and Theresa take their relationship to the next level, and a resident makes a discovery that stops them in their tracks

programme.title: Hollyoaks

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Cumbria is the location for three more couples to demonstrate their cooking and hosting skills, kicking off with teachers Rory and Sam, who serve up dishes inspired by Europe. Day two sees Sarka and Paul lay on a Czech menu, but the massive portions defeat everyone - except the ever-hungry Rory. Finally, it's the turn of John and Sally with their retro 1980s evening. Which couple will win the cash prize of £1,000?

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to the Prohibition Grille in Everett, Washington, where he meets belly dancer-turned-restaurateur Rishi Brown, who is making all the wrong moves with her business. Distracted from the task of improving her menu by performing for customers, she's oblivious to the disastrous dishes being served from her own kitchen

programme.title: Ramsay's Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to Nashville, Tennessee, the spiritual home of country music, but his visit begins on a sour note at Chappy's Cajun restaurant. Chef John Chapman's careless methods have damaged his reputation, but he blames the local clientele rather than his less-than-appetising food and disturbing kitchen practices. Can Gordon get through to this stubborn owner and save the eatery from disaster?

programme.title: Married at First Sight USA
programme.desc: With a fractious atmosphere in the air, the couples head off for a weekend retreat. And there are big questions looming for all of the newlyweds

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Jay and Gloria celebrate their anniversary, but cannot decide on what kind of gift to give each other. Meanwhile, the Dunphys join Alex on her college tour and Phil, Luke and Haley find themselves in a mirrored waiting room with a button and a sign that says 'Do Not Push'. Comedy, starring Ed O'Neill and Julie Bowen

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil comes across footage of an incriminating sneeze while looking at Cameron and Mitchell's wedding video that proves he is responsible for the family's flu epidemic, so he sets about getting rid of the proof with the help of Luke and some creative editing. Claire struggles to make it through an important business meeting while feeling under the weather, while Cam is forced to make a difficult decision when it comes to Manny and the school football team. Mitch meets Lily's know-it-all friend and male nanny Andy (Andy DeVine) makes a welcome return

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer falls out with Marge over revelations contained in an old letter, and moves into the home of a gay couple who keep him happy by plying him with food. With the guest voice of 'Weird Al' Yankovic

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family spends Christmas on a ranch, where Lisa falls in love with an older boy, and Homer and Bart help locals protesting against a dam built by industrious beavers. Featuring the guest voices of David Byrne, Jonathan Taylor Thomas and Andy Serkis

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Santa's Little Helper is thrown out of the house for failing to save Homer from a fire - but goes on to earn a fortune as the new Duff Beer mascot, making him the subject of a bitter ownership battle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer has his driving licence revoked for being a menace to other road-users, forcing Marge to take charge of the family car and run endless errands for everyone - a responsibility she soon starts to resent. Featuring the guest voices of Steve Busmen and singer-songwriter Jackson Browne

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta enlists Jeffords to help him tackle a cold case that everyone thinks is unsolvable. Meanwhile, Santiago plans a romantic weekend away with her new boyfriend Teddy, and Gina and Diaz tell Boyle one of their best-kept secrets. Comedy, starring Andy Samberg and Melissa Fumero

programme.title: Brooklyn Nine-Nine
programme.desc: Peralta suspects a civic leader of money laundering, but his investigation is shut down by the police commissioner. Determined to crack the case, he enlists Santiago and Holt to help uncover more evidence - and risks suspension as a result. Boyle is devastated when Vivian ends their relationship, so his colleagues try to cheer him up

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Everyone gathers at Jay and Gloria's to celebrate Alex's graduation, but Phil is devastated to be missing the occasion thanks to an ear infection preventing him from flying home from a business trip to Seattle. Jay frets about Gloria's cousin, who has overstayed his welcome, while Claire stresses about giving Alex the perfect gift. Mitch hides important news from Cam, and Andy and Haley finally come to a realisation about their feelings for each other

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: The return of the American comedy about a man and his extended family living in three different households. Recent events force Haley and Andy to cope with their emotions in different ways, while Jay and Gloria are in for a shock when they start looking for a pre-school for Joe. Plus, Cam attempts to remain supportive of Mitch's midlife career crisis, but when money begins to get tight, he hatches a plan. Ed O'Neill Stars

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.sub-title: The Day Alex Left for College
programme.desc: Phil and Claire feel rejected when Alex deliberately tells them the wrong date for her moving-in day at college as she wants to keep things as low-key as possible, while Luke makes it clear he would rather hang out with schoolfriends than spend the day with his dad. Elsewhere, the rest of the family come up with an elaborate excuse to avoid going to Lily's football game, and things get stressful for Mitch and Cam now after they decided to rent out their top floor

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil helps Haley persuade Claire to let Dylan move in, but he soon has second thoughts after he discovers just what living with him really means. Meanwhile, Mitch takes on a much-needed new role working for Jay's business rivals Closets, Closets, Closets, Closets! and Gloria and Cameron come to blows over how to deal with Manny's problem at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a doting father and decides to spend quality time with his youngest daughter when he discovers Santa's Little Helper knows Maggie better than he does. Meanwhile, a lonely Moe joins an online dating agency, and gets a pleasant surprise when he meets an attractive woman

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Good, the Sad and the Drugly
programme.desc: Bart is on his best behaviour as he tries to win the affections of a girl at his school, while Lisa reports on what Springfield will look like in 50 years. With the voice of Anne Hathaway (Les Miserables)

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is forced to eat bland food after he burns his taste buds while trying to copy a fire-eating street performer. He becomes a regular at Springfield Elementary's canteen where he learns a new parenting technique to try out on Bart and Lisa - but its overbearing nature leads to disaster. Meanwhile, Marge enjoys a sauna she discovers in the basement

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge and Homer rent an apartment in an affluent area so their children can have a good education when Springfield Elementary is rated the worst school in the state. Bart wastes no time in establishing a bad-boy persona, and increases Lisa's popularity by telling people she knows a pop star. With the voice of Elliot Page (Juno)

programme.title: Hollyoaks
programme.desc: The village gathers for Diane's funeral, and Dee Dee struggles to hide her emotions after a recent discovery. Elsewhere, Beth continues to seek justice, and a resident's trauma catches up with them

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer becomes a union representative at the power plant and immediately uses his new-found authority to save the company's free dental plan and avoid having to pay for Lisa's new braces. Featuring the voice of Dr Joyce Brothers

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Recruitment consultant Lee sits down for a meal with Abbi, who lives a more civilised lifestyle than he does. Septuagenarian Deanna, who hasn't been on a date in 20 years, meets ex-car mechanic Alex, but he seems more interested in the waiter than in her, while beauty ambassador Bianca is paired with Teza, who prides himself on being an entertainer, but admits that his cockiness is a mask for his own insecurity

Anna Richardson assists both singletons, inviting them to choose their favourite partner from a line-up of potential dates who reveal themselves one body part at a time until fully nude. The contenders then don their glad rags to enjoy a date together

programme.desc: Two drifters meet by chance in the desert, later joined on their travels by one of the duo's reckless younger brothers and a man they break out of prison. Western, starring Kevin Kline, Kevin Costner, Scott Glenn, Danny Glover, Rosanna Arquette and Jeff Goldblum

programme.desc: A criminal is released from prison with revenge in mind. His brother was murdered while he was behind bars. Action adventure, starring Dwayne Johnson, Billy Bob Thornton, Oliver Jackson-Cohen and Carla Gugino

programme.title: Centurion (2010)
programme.desc: A Roman legion is sent on a mission to crush a Pictish uprising, only to be nearly wiped out in a savage ambush. Neil Marshall's action thriller, with Michael Fassbender, Dominic West and Olga Kurylenko

Action thriller, starring Michael Jai White and Steve Austin
